revision.text:
'''{{nihongo|Suwa Yorimitsu|諏訪頼満}}''' ([[1480]]-[[1540]]) Suwa Yorimitsu, a warlord of the [[Shinano Province]]. In the province of Shinano, the region that was controlled by Yorimitsu was [[Lake Suwa]]. During the year of [[1485]], Yorimitsu's father was killed by his own retainers for unknown reasons. But Yorimitsu in the end was a very capable leader, greatly strengthening the domain of [[Suwa]].
{{Japan-bio-stub}}
[[Category:Daimyo|Suwa Yorimitsu]] [[Category:1480 births|Suwa Yorimitsu]] [[Category:1540 deaths|Suwa Yorimitsu]]
[[ja:諏訪頼満]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[fa:سووا یوریمیتسو]][[fr:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[ja:諏訪頼満 (安芸守)]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1480|death_date=1540|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|qid=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|samurai|qid=Q38142}}|title={{ill|daimyo|qid=Q61982}}|children={{ill|Suwa Yoritaka|qid=Q11631967}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q7650544]] Wikidata name: Suwa Yorimitsu [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{More citations needed|date=November 2024}}'''{{nihongo|Suwa Yorimitsu|諏訪 頼満}}''' (1480–1540) was a warlord of the [[:en:Shinano Province|Shinano Province]].<ref>{{Cite book |last=川村一彦 |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=ufgeEAAAQBAJ&dq=%E8%AB%8F%E8%A8%AA+%E9%A0%BC%E6%BA%80&pg=PA57 |title=小田井原の戦い |publisher=歴史研究会 |language=ja}}{{Unreliable source?|reason=The author Kazuhiko KAWAMURA (川村一彦) has published many ebooks through copy-paste plagiarism from the Japanese Wikipedia. Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}}</ref>{{Unreliable source?|reason=The author Kazuhiko KAWAMURA (川村一彦) has published many ebooks through copy-paste plagiarism from the Japanese Wikipedia. Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}} The region that was controlled by Yorimitsu was [[:en:Lake Suwa|Lake Suwa]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last=正治 |first=笹本 |date=1992-12-25 |title=Vanished Customs |url=https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390853649019501568 |journal=国立歴史民俗博物館研究報告 = Bulletin of the National Museum of Japanese History |language=ja |volume=45 |pages=195–212 |doi=10.15024/00000585}}</ref> During the year of 1485, Yorimitsu's father was killed by his own retainers for unknown reasons. But Yorimitsu in the end was a very capable leader, greatly strengthening the domain of [[:en:Suwa Province|Suwa]].
==References== {{reflist}}{{Daimyo-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}

Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}} The region that was controlled by Yorimitsu was [[:en:Lake Suwa|Lake Suwa]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last=正治 |first=笹本 |date=1992-12-25 |title=Vanished Customs |url=https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390853649019501568 |journal=国立歴史民俗博物館研究報告 = Bulletin of the National Museum of Japanese History |language=ja |volume=45 |pages=195–212 |doi=10.15024/00000585}}</ref> During the year of 1485, Yorimitsu's father was killed by his own retainers for unknown reasons. But Yorimitsu in the end was a very capable leader, greatly strengthening the domain of [[:en:Suwa Province|Suwa]].
==References== {{reflist}}{{Daimyo-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}

revision.comment: Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[fa:سووا یوریمیتسو]][[fr:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[ja:諏訪頼満 (安芸守)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[fa:سووا یوریمیتسو]][[fr:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[ja:諏訪頼満 (安芸守)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[fa:سووا یوریمیتسو]][[fr:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[ja:諏訪頼満 (安芸守)]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1480|death_date=1540|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|samurai|WD=Q38142}}|title={{ill|daimyo|WD=Q61982}}|children={{ill|Suwa Yoritaka|WD=Q11631967}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q7650544]] Wikidata name: Suwa Yorimitsu [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{More citations needed|date=November 2024}}'''{{nihongo|Suwa Yorimitsu|諏訪 頼満}}''' (1480–1540) was a warlord of the [[:en:Shinano Province|Shinano Province]].<ref>{{Cite book |last=川村一彦 |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=ufgeEAAAQBAJ&dq=%E8%AB%8F%E8%A8%AA+%E9%A0%BC%E6%BA%80&pg=PA57 |title=小田井原の戦い |publisher=歴史研究会 |language=ja}}{{Unreliable source?|reason=The author Kazuhiko KAWAMURA (川村一彦) has published many ebooks through copy-paste plagiarism from the Japanese Wikipedia. Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}}</ref>{{Unreliable source?|reason=The author Kazuhiko KAWAMURA (川村一彦) has published many ebooks through copy-paste plagiarism from the Japanese Wikipedia. Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}} The region that was controlled by Yorimitsu was [[:en:Lake Suwa|Lake Suwa]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last=正治 |first=笹本 |date=1992-12-25 |title=Vanished Customs |url=https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390853649019501568 |journal=国立歴史民俗博物館研究報告 = Bulletin of the National Museum of Japanese History |language=ja |volume=45 |pages=195–212 |doi=10.15024/00000585}}</ref> During the year of 1485, Yorimitsu's father was killed by his own retainers for unknown reasons. But Yorimitsu in the end was a very capable leader, greatly strengthening the domain of [[:en:Suwa Province|Suwa]].
==References== {{reflist}}{{Daimyo-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}
{{draft categories|
}}

Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}}</ref>{{Unreliable source?|reason=The author Kazuhiko KAWAMURA (川村一彦) has published many ebooks through copy-paste plagiarism from the Japanese Wikipedia. Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}} The region that was controlled by Yorimitsu was [[:en:Lake Suwa|Lake Suwa]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last=正治 |first=笹本 |date=1992-12-25 |title=Vanished Customs |url=https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390853649019501568 |journal=国立歴史民俗博物館研究報告 = Bulletin of the National Museum of Japanese History |language=ja |volume=45 |pages=195–212 |doi=10.15024/00000585}}</ref> During the year of 1485, Yorimitsu's father was killed by his own retainers for unknown reasons. But Yorimitsu in the end was a very capable leader, greatly strengthening the domain of [[:en:Suwa Province|Suwa]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[fa:سووا یوریمیتسو]][[fr:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[ja:諏訪頼満 (安芸守)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[fa:سووا یوریمیتسو]][[fr:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[ja:諏訪頼満 (安芸守)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[fa:سووا یوریمیتسو]][[fr:Suwa Yorimitsu]][[ja:諏訪頼満 (安芸守)]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1480|death_date=1540|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|occupation={{ill|samurai|WD=Q38142}}|title={{ill|daimyo|WD=Q61982}}|children={{ill|Suwa Yoritaka|WD=Q11631967}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q7650544]] Wikidata name: Suwa Yorimitsu [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{More citations needed|date=November 2024}}'''{{nihongo|Suwa Yorimitsu|諏訪 頼満}}''' (1480–1540) was a warlord of the {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|WD=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province}}.<ref>{{Cite book |last=川村一彦 |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=ufgeEAAAQBAJ&dq=%E8%AB%8F%E8%A8%AA+%E9%A0%BC%E6%BA%80&pg=PA57 |title=小田井原の戦い |publisher=歴史研究会 |language=ja}}{{Unreliable source?|reason=The author Kazuhiko KAWAMURA (川村一彦) has published many ebooks through copy-paste plagiarism from the Japanese Wikipedia. Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}}</ref>{{Unreliable source?|reason=The author Kazuhiko KAWAMURA (川村一彦) has published many ebooks through copy-paste plagiarism from the Japanese Wikipedia. Please see [[:ja:WP:CFW#川村一彦の著作物]] ( https://w.wiki/AWqv ). |date=November 2024}} The region that was controlled by Yorimitsu was {{ill|Lake Suwa|en|Lake Suwa|WD=Q1206692|lt=Lake Suwa}}.<ref>{{Cite journal |last=正治 |first=笹本 |date=1992-12-25 |title=Vanished Customs |url=https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390853649019501568 |journal=国立歴史民俗博物館研究報告 = Bulletin of the National Museum of Japanese History |language=ja |volume=45 |pages=195–212 |doi=10.15024/00000585}}</ref> During the year of 1485, Yorimitsu's father was killed by his own retainers for unknown reasons. But Yorimitsu in the end was a very capable leader, greatly strengthening the domain of {{ill|Suwa Province|en|Suwa Province|WD=Q1192248|lt=Suwa}}.
==References== {{reflist}}{{Daimyo-stub}} {{Suwa Faith}}
